Fabienne M

Digital Movement have been amazing to work with. Dean and the team built me a great website and set up SEO and Google Ads and I started getting real leads not long after. The team is easy to talk to, quick to respond and they explain everything in plain English. I finally feel confident that my marketing is being looked after. Definitely recommend their services!
Beth Sorensen
8 months ago
Digital Movement team have done incredible job for my first built website.

They delivered amazing results and customer service experience received from Martey from start all way through to end results couldn't say how much happy I am with him & his team that worked hard to deliver the results wanted.

Martey & I had discussion about google ads his insights were so clear on how my ads were going in last ad.

They know there stuff and know how to get the results I need, this best business you could trust for this digital marketing & website designs.

Thanks for looking after me and giving me best package deal & price for what needed at the time.

Look forward to working alongside you with my small business.
Michael Peard
9 months ago
Stuart, Dean and the crew have been excellent in creating a complete redesign of a new website for my business and managing Google advertising and SEO work with great results quite quickly. They have always been very responsive in communication and have been great to work with. Highly recommend!
Matthew Kang
10 months ago
Stuart and the team at Digital Movement have been exceptional. from taking over my first website Fitrme updating all of the seo and driving us to top spots in google, to building my new site Unlocking My Ability, their communication is prompt, updates are clear, and their understanding of my goals is spot on. They don't just build websites—they bring your vision to life. I'm proud of what we've created together and confident the SEO on my second site will deliver a strong ROI in time. Highly recommend this passionate and professional team. Thank you and I look forward to our continued partnership. Eddie and Team
